title: proustia cuneifolia subsp. cinerea
intro: Proustia cuneifolia subsp. cinerea, also known as the "Grey Proustia," is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Proustia cuneifolia subsp. cinerea are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
